overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character in western attire walking along a dark mountain trail at dusk during a storm. The character moves steadily along a dirt path beside rocky cliffs and pine trees under a dramatic, cloudy sky.

events.description: character walks out from under the rocky overhang into more open terrain

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail beneath a rocky overhang, moving toward the open sky ahead

entered.detail: large rock formation overhanging the trail on the left side, creating a partial cave-like cover
narrow dirt path winding through grass and rocks
tall pine trees lining the right side of the trail in the distance
dark storm clouds visible through the gap ahead, illuminated by dim twilight

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the character walking beneath a large rocky overhang that provides partial cover. The trail is narrow and natural, with pine trees visible in the distance on the right. As the character progresses, they emerge from under the overhang around the 12-second mark, revealing more of the stormy sky ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain trail with cliff on left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail with rocky cliffs now visible on the left side and trees on the right

entered.detail: vertical rock wall of the mountain formation, now visible beside the trail

segments.scene_description: Having exited the overhang, the character walks along a more open section of the mountain trail. The rocky cliff face is now visible on the left as a vertical wall rather than an overhead cover. The pine trees on the right draw closer as the character advances along the winding dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow trail alongside tall cliff wall

agents.ego_description: walking closer to the tall cliff face on the left as the trail narrows, with dense forest visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The trail narrows as the character walks closer to the imposing cliff face on the left, which now dominates the near view. The path continues forward with the rocky wall towering nearby, while the trees on the right recede into the middle distance under the dark stormy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail that shifts from the shelter of a rocky overhang to an exposed path dominated by a towering cliff face. It begins with the character walking beneath a large stone ledge that provides partial cover, with distant pine trees visible to the right. As the character progresses, they emerge from under the overhang into the open air, revealing a dramatic stormy sky and a vertical rocky wall that now lines the left side of the winding dirt path. The scene then shifts as the trail narrows, bringing the character closer to the imposing cliff face which begins to dominate the view. Finally, the camera follows the character forward as the rocky wall towers nearby while the pine trees recede into the middle distance under the dark, clouded horizon.
